tools.name: fx_rates
tools.description: Get the latest foreign-exchange rates for a base currency (default USD), optionally limited to specific target currencies. Source: European Central Bank reference rates.

tools.name: fx_convert
tools.description: Convert an amount from one currency to another at the latest ECB reference rate. Returns the rate, the converted result, and the rate date.

tools.name: fx_historical
tools.description: Get foreign-exchange rates for a base currency on a specific past date (YYYY-MM-DD). ECB publishes rates on business days; a weekend/holiday date returns the most recent prior business day.

tools.name: fx_timeseries
tools.description: Get a time series of exchange rates for a base currency over a date range (max ~1 year), useful for trend analysis. Provide start and end as YYYY-MM-DD and one or more target currencies.

tools.name: fx_currencies
tools.description: List the currencies supported for exchange-rate lookups, with their full names.

findings.title: Tool removed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "crypto_price" is no longer advertised. Removal can precede a shadowing replacement from another server.

findings.title: Tool removed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "crypto_market" is no longer advertised. Removal can precede a shadowing replacement from another server.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "fx_convert" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Convert an amount between two currencies at the latest ECB reference rate via Frankfurter. Use for currency conversion and pricing." → after: "Convert an amount from one currency to another at the latest ECB reference rate. Returns the rate, the converted result, and the rate date."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "fx_rates" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Latest foreign-exchange rates for a base currency (ECB data via Frankfurter). Returns rates for all or selected target currencies." → after: "Get the latest foreign-exchange rates for a base currency (default USD), optionally limited to specific target currencies. Source: European Central Bank reference rates."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.

findings.title: Tool removed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "stock_quote" is no longer advertised. Removal can precede a shadowing replacement from another server.
